name: quote

quotes.text: The best time to plant a tree was 20 years ago. The second best time is now.
quotes.author: Chinese Proverb

quotes.text: What you do today can improve all your tomorrows.
quotes.author: Ralph Marston

quotes.text: It does not matter how slowly you go as long as you do not stop.
quotes.author: Confucius

quotes.text: Everything you've ever wanted is on the other side of fear.
quotes.author: George Addair

quotes.text: The only way to do great work is to love what you do.
quotes.author: Steve Jobs

quotes.text: Start where you are. Use what you have. Do what you can.
quotes.author: Arthur Ashe

quotes.text: Discipline is choosing between what you want now and what you want most.
quotes.author: Abraham Lincoln

css: #quote-widget { height:100%; display:flex; flex-direction:column; align-items:center; justify-content:center; padding:1.5em; box-sizing:border-box; } #quote-widget .q-text { font-size:clamp(1rem,6.4cqi,2rem); color:var(--fg,#ccc); font-style:italic; text-align:center; line-height:1.5; max-width:90%; } #quote-widget .q-author { font-size:clamp(0.7rem,4cqi,1.1rem); color:var(--fg-dim,#888); margin-top:0.8em; letter-spacing:0.1em; }
